各位听众早上好，欢迎收听2026年7月9日早间新闻速递。今天是星期四，以下是今日新闻要点。

首先关注国际头条。美伊局势再度升级，美军对伊朗发动新一轮打击。美国总统特朗普在北约峰会上宣布美伊谅解备忘录"已终结"，并威胁将再次打击伊朗。伊朗方面回应称如遭打击将加倍奉还，美军中央司令部证实已启动对伊朗的新一轮打击。霍尔木兹海峡油轮通行已基本停止，全球油价大幅上涨。

国际货币基金组织发布最新世界经济展望报告，下调今年世界经济增长预期至百分之三，同时上调中国经济增长预期至百分之四点六，认为中国高技术制造业表现亮眼。

国内方面，2025年度国家科学技术奖揭晓，陈立泉院士和贲德院士获得国家最高科学技术奖。北大韦东奕研究员获得国家自然科学奖二等奖。

财政部紧急预拨五千万元支持湖北、甘肃开展救灾工作。湖北多地近日遭遇强降雨和雷暴大风，局地发生龙卷风。

财经方面，长鑫科技正式启动科创板IPO，发行超过66亿股。浪潮信息上半年净利润预计增长超过两倍。人民银行连续第20个月增持黄金。

国家发改委安排八千亿元超长期特别国债资金，用于支持1417个重大项目建设。

国际方面，北约承诺向乌克兰提供700亿欧元军事装备，并宣布超过500亿美元的新军事采购。俄罗斯实施柴油出口禁令。

以上就是今天的早间新闻速递，感谢收听，祝您一天好心情！
TTS_TEXT

UA="aihot-skill/0.3.4 (+https://aihot.virxact.com/aihot-skill/)"
# 用户明确说"日报"，走 daily 端点
curl -sH "User-Agent: $UA" "https://aihot.virxact.com/api/public/daily" -o /tmp/aihot_daily.json
echo "=== HTTP fetch done ==="
echo "=== Size ==="
wc -c /tmp/aihot_daily.json
echo "=== Quick peek ==="
jq '{date, lead: .lead.title, sectionCount: (.sections | length), flashes: (.flashes | length)}' /tmp/aihot_daily.json 2>/dev/null || head -c 500 /tmp/aihot_daily.json
jq '.sections[] | {label: .label, count: (.items | length)}' /tmp/aihot_daily.json

# 提取 AI 日报全部条目（含 permalink + sourceName + summary）
jq -r '
.sections[] as $s |
  $s.label as $label |
  $s.items[] |
  "### " + $label + " | " + .title + "\nSRC: " + (.sourceName // "N/A") + "\nLINK: " + ((.permalink // .sourceUrl // "N/A")) + "\nSUMMARY: " + ((.summary // "") | gsub("\n"; " ")) + "\n---"
' /tmp/aihot_daily.json > /tmp/aihot_flat.txt
echo "=== Output saved ==="
wc -l /tmp/aihot_flat.txt
head -c 2000 /tmp/aihot_flat.txt

jq -r '.sections[] | .label as $lbl | .items[] | "### " + $lbl + " | " + .title + "
SRC: " + (.sourceName // "N/A") + "
LINK: " + ((.permalink // .sourceUrl // "N/A")) + "
SUMMARY: " + ((.summary // "") | gsub("
"; " ")) + "
---"' /tmp/aihot_daily.json > /tmp/aihot_flat.txt
wc -l /tmp/aihot_flat.txt
head -c 3000 /tmp/aihot_flat.txt

jq -r '
.date as $d |
"日期: " + $d + "\n" +
(.sections[] |
  "\n=== " + .label + " ===\n" +
  (.items[] |
    "- " + .title + "\n  来源: " + (.sourceName // "未知") + "\n  摘要: " + ((.summary // "") | .[0:200]) + "\n  链接: " + (.permalink // .sourceUrl // "N/A")
  )
)
' /tmp/aihot_daily.json

# 调用 github-trending skill - 看看今天的热门仓库（爬取 github.com/trending） curl -sH "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; TrendingBot/1.0)" "https://github.com/trending?since=daily" -o /tmp/github-trending.html # Check if we have node/cheerio or other tools to parse ls -la /tmp/github-trending.html echo "---" # Try to parse with python python3 << 'PYEOF' import re from html.parser import HTMLParser with open('/tmp/github-trending.html', encoding='utf-8') as f: html = f.read() # Find all article.Box-row elements articles = re.findall(r']*class="Box-row"[^>]*>(.*?)', html, re.DOTALL) if not articles: print("No articles found - GitHub may have changed HTML structure or returned non-200") print("First 500 chars of file:") print(html[:500]) results = [] for art in articles[:25]: # repo link link_m = re.search(r']*>.*?]*href="(/[^"]+)"', art, re.DOTALL) repo = link_m.group(1) if link_m else '' # description desc_m = re.search(r']*class="[^"]*col-9[^"]*"[^>]*>(.*?)

', art, re.DOTALL) desc = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', desc_m.group(1)).strip() if desc_m else '' # language lang_m = re.search(r'itemprop="programmingLanguage"[^>]*>([^<]+)<', art) lang = lang_m.group(1).strip() if lang_m else '' # stars # Look for /stargazers link stars_m = re.search(r'href="[^"]*/stargazers"[^>]*>([^<]+)<', art) stars = stars_m.group(1).strip() if stars_m else '' # forks forks_m = re.search(r'href="[^"]*/forks"[^>]*>([^<]+)<', art) forks = forks_m.group(1).strip() if forks_m else '' # stars today today_m = re.search(r'([\d,]+)\s*stars?\s*(today|this week|this month)', art) stars_today = today_m.group(1).strip() if today_m else '' if repo: results.append(f"### {repo}\n- Language: {lang}\n- Stars: {stars} Forks: {forks} Today: {stars_today}\n- Description: {desc}\n") print(f"Found {len(results)} repos\n") for r in results: print(r) PYEOF

# 看一下完整结果前面有什么

echo

jq '{date, lead: .lead, sections: [.sections[] | {label, count: (.items | length)}], flashes: (.flashes | length)}' /tmp/aihot_daily.json

jq -r '.sections[] | "## \(.label)
" + ([.items[] | "- title: \(.title)
  source: \(.sourceName)

"))]' /tmp/aihot_daily.json > /tmp/aihot_daily.txt

head -50 /tmp/aihot_daily.txt
jq '{date: .date, sectionCounts: [.sections[] | {label, count: (.items | length)}], flashCount: (.flashes | length)}' /tmp/aihot_daily.json
jq '.sections[] | {label, count: (.items | length)}' /tmp/aihot_daily.json
jq '.flashes | length' /tmp/aihot_daily.json
jq '.sections | length' /tmp/aihot_daily.json && jq '.sections[0].label' /tmp/aihot_daily.json && jq '.sections[0].items | length' /tmp/aihot_daily.json

# 5 sections, dump each section's items as json array

done
